name: Suspicious IOC (IP / Domain / Hash)
description:
This template is used to investigate suspicious indicators such as IP addresses, domains, URLs, or file hashes.
Indicators may originate from threat intelligence feeds, MISP, or internal detections.

tasks.title: Intelligence Enrichment
tasks.description:
Search indicator in MISP

Run Cortex analyzers (VT, Passive DNS, Whois)

tasks.title: Closure
tasks.description:
Document findings

Update indicator status

Close case

tasks.title: Response
tasks.description:
Recommend block / monitor / ignore

Share indicator to MISP if confirmed

tasks.title: Validation
tasks.description:
Verify indicator format

Confirm source credibility

tasks.title: Impact Assessment
tasks.description:
Check internal logs for matches

Identify affected systems

extraData.content:
Incident Summary:
Brief description of the incident and how it was detected.

Detection Source:
Tool or system that generated the alert.

Analysis Performed:
Summary of Cortex analyzers, MISP correlation, and manual analysis.

Findings:
Key indicators and conclusions.

Response Actions:
Containment, remediation, or monitoring actions taken.

Outcome:
Final status of the incident.

Lessons Learned:
Recommendations or improvements.
